components.value: V, S, F/DF (a small lodestone sphere)

area.value: circle centered on you with a radius of 400 ft. + 40 ft./level

description.value: You sense the direction of the nearest teleportation circle (permanent or with a remaining duration), gate spell, or other effect which magically connects two different locations (for example, an active magic item, a creatureâs special ability, or unique adventure location). Locate gate detects only spells or effects with a permanent or ongoing duration, not instantaneous effects like dimension door or teleport. Locate gate can be blocked by spells like nondetection, if the effect originates from a specific object or creature. However, spell effects canât likewise be warded. For example, ring gates are a specific object, but a permanent teleportation circle is not (the surface in which itâs inscribed doesnât count). Locate gate isnât blocked by lead, water, or other physical environmental conditions, but it is blocked by any intervening area that is dimensionally warded (such as by dimensional lock or forbiddance ).
